text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to run a record-breaking historic race in
the autumn Tenno Sho, we've devised a secret
plan for summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That plan is to work with Sakura Bakushin O! If
you're talking speed, she's the first person that
comes to mind. Training begins at four in the
morning—huh?! Four?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But there's no time to complain. The two of them
begin to Bakushin.
